jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Global-search/preferences accessibility regressions passed: 10 tests; full Vitest passed: 176 files / 719 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; /preferences returned 307; /api/preferences returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P2 accessibility polish for global search and preference toggles
lastRun.summary: Improved keyboard/screen-reader accessibility for global search and preferences: global search now exposes a labelled modal dialog, combobox, listbox/options, active descendant, and selected state; preference toggles now render as labelled switches with aria-checked, focus-visible rings, and an announced save status.
validation: production baseline before work: vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service active; /api/status healthy; major route probes returned 307/401/200; recent logs clean
full npm test -- --run passed 176 files / 719 tests
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
recent production logs checked; no new error/warn entries
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed. Commit/push is the next closeout step for this run.
lastRun.nextTarget: Commit/push this verified batch, then continue with P2 unpaginated/large-read reduction or P3 management-facing URL/direct-access hardening. Because the fresh-audit threshold was already reached before this run, the next reportable cycle should perform a comprehensive fresh audit after this batch is committed.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
